source: manual code audit against blueprint.txt phase checklist

notes: Monorepo scaffold complete

Workspace and membership model complete (create, list)
Page CRUD endpoints complete (create, get, patch meta, put content with versioning)
Web UI with TipTap editor and 2s-debounce autosave complete
Prisma schema and initial migration SQL created
Unit tests: 10 passing (token, versioning, workspace slug)
Integration tests: 45 passing (auth 14, workspaces 9, pages 22)
Exit criteria met: user can create workspace and first page, autosave works with version checks
Prisma schema: PagePermission + InviteToken models + PageRole enum
Domain layer: permissions.ts, tree.ts, ordering.ts
API: page tree, trash/restore, move, share/unshare, invite/accept
Frontend: sidebar page tree with collapse/expand, new/delete, trash panel with restore
Unit tests: 47 passing, Integration tests: 86 passing
Exit criteria met: role enforcement in tests, deleted pages recoverable from trash
Prisma schema: isPublished, publishedAt, publishToken on Page + GIN index migration
API: POST /pages/:id/publish, POST /pages/:id/unpublish
API: GET /public/:shareToken (no auth required)
API: GET /search?q=&workspaceId= (PostgreSQL full-text with ilike fallback)
API: GET /pages/:id/revisions, POST /pages/:id/revisions/:revisionId/restore
Frontend: full Notion-like layout — sidebar tree, search modal, publish toggle, public link copy, revision history panel
Integration tests: 112 passing total (26 new Phase 3 tests)
Total test suite: 47 unit + 112 integration = 159 tests all passing
Exit criteria met: published pages accessible without login, revision restore validated end-to-end
Desktop app folder exists
Tauri integration and packaging workflow not implemented
